description_long: This is a female warrior character with an athletic build, dressed in elaborate fantasy armor and clothing. She wears a fitted armored top with ornate shoulder guards, fingerless gloves, and a decorative belt with metallic accents. Her lower body is clad in tight leggings and armored boots with intricate designs, and she has two curved daggers sheathed at her hips. The character's face is framed by long, straight hair, and she has pointed ears, suggesting an elven or fantasy origin. The overall appearance is that of a skilled combatant, blending agility and protection, with a focus on mobility and style.
description: A female fantasy warrior in ornate armor, with long hair, pointed ears, and dual daggers at her hips.
description_view_0: Front view shows the detailed armor, facial features, and both daggers at her hips.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of her face, pointed ear, and the side armor details.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of her hair, the ornate design on her lower armor, and the placement of the daggers.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the other profile, arm, and leg armor, as well as the dagger's hilt.
attribute_clothing_type: fantasy armored outfit with fitted top, shoulder guards, fingerless gloves, decorative belt, and armored boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended outward
